options.name: -EventArguments
options.description: Specifies an object that contains options for the event.

options.name: -MessageData
options.description: Specifies additional data associated with the event. The value of this parameter appears in the MessageData property of the event object.

options.name: -Sender
options.description: Specifies the object that raises the event. The default is the PowerShell engine.

options.name: -SourceIdentifier
options.description: Specifies a name for the new event. This parameter is required, and it must be unique in the session.
